AirskinColors.description: This expresses a set of AirSkin pad colors
AirskinColors.raw:
# This expresses a set of AirSkin pad colors
std_msgs/Header header                  # timestamp in the header is the acquisition time and frame

uint16[] idx                   # index of the color in the colors array 
                               # if empty the colors array must match the target system
std_msgs/ColorRGBA[] colors    # RGBA color values for corresponding AirSkin pads

fields.name: header
fields.comment: timestamp in the header is the acquisition time and frame

fields.name: idx
fields.comment: index of the color in the colors array

fields.name: colors
fields.comment: RGBA color values for corresponding AirSkin pads

AirskinInfo.description: This expresses a set of AirSkin pad pressures
AirskinInfo.raw:
# This expresses a set of AirSkin pad pressures
std_msgs/Header header                  # timestamp in the header is the acquisition time and frame

uint8[] ids                    # I2C ids of target AirSkin pads
string[] names                 # names and TF frames names of corresponding AirSkin pads
uint32[] min                   # pressure min value
uint32[] max                   # pressure max value

fields.name: header
fields.comment: timestamp in the header is the acquisition time and frame

fields.name: ids
fields.comment: I2C ids of target AirSkin pads

fields.name: names
fields.comment: names and TF frames names of corresponding AirSkin pads

AirskinPressures.description: This expresses a set of AirSkin pad pressures
AirskinPressures.raw:
# This expresses a set of AirSkin pad pressures
std_msgs/Header header                  # timestamp in the header is the acquisition time and frame
uint32[] pressures             # pressure values of corresponding AirSkin pads

fields.name: header
fields.comment: timestamp in the header is the acquisition time and frame

fields.name: pressures
fields.comment: pressure values of corresponding AirSkin pads
